description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub CI that tests on every push to master and tlslite-ng-0.7 branches and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (2.6, 2.7, 3.6-3.13) across various Ubuntu environments, including some with optional dependencies like m2crypto, pycrypto, gmpy, and brotli. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python with the specified version, and run tests.
